meta.siteDescription: A minimal Korean-style wedding invitation website built with React, Vite and Tailwind CSS.

hero.description: A quiet celebration in deep greens, paper texture, and honest light. Join us as we begin our next chapter.

images.alt: Benny holding flowers in a green field.
Benny and Cindy embracing in an outdoor field.
Benny and Cindy in a studio portrait.

event.title: Let's celebrate love, laughter, and happily ever after.
event.description: 歡迎穿著素色T-Shirt前來，請別太拘束！​
event.imageAlt: Benny and Cindy standing together in wedding attire.
event.address: 110臺北市信義區信義路五段18號B1

gallery.title: 婚紗照片
gallery.description: 依照素材特性安排了留白與人物近景交錯的節奏，互動只保留淡入、微位移與點擊放大，讓照片本身成為主角。

countdown.title: 2026年 8 月 1 日
countdown.description: 期待在那一天，與你一起分享我們的喜悅。
countdown.backgroundAlt: Benny and Cindy lying together on the grass.

contacts.title: 聯絡方式
contacts.description: 如有任何需求或其他問題，歡迎隨時聯繫我們。
contacts.backgroundAlt: Benny and Cindy standing in an open green field.

seatSearch.title: 座位查詢
seatSearch.description: 已預留獨立路由與按鈕入口。第二階段可直接擴充賓客姓名搜尋、桌次顯示與出席資訊整合。
